title: Add Leitstand runtime health receipt
goal: Add a deterministic read-only health/freshness receipt for Leitstand that reports service status, git head, snapshot freshness, and boundary non-claims without adding execution authority to the UI.

acceptance.assertion: The health receipt reads service and artifact status only and performs no external mutation.
Snapshot freshness warnings are explicit and do not claim Bureau or Grabowski execution truth.
Canonical HTTPS /health returns leitstand_runtime_health_receipt with status ok after deployment.

metadata.outcome: Leitstand PR #160 added /health as a read-only runtime health receipt, merged it to main, rebuilt the service on heim-pc, restarted leitstand.service, and canonical HTTPS /health reported status ok against main commit 52825f4af4693b652f4cffc06297463a93a7ee0e.
validation: Leitstand PR #160 GitHub CI passed CI/build, ai-context guard, security-hygiene and Cloudflare Pages.
Local before merge: NODE_OPTIONS=--jitless pnpm typecheck -> passed.
Local before merge: NODE_OPTIONS=--jitless pnpm lint -> passed.
Local before merge: NODE_OPTIONS=--jitless pnpm build -> passed.
Local before merge: /health endpoint smoke on port 3108 -> status ok.
Post-merge deployment: NODE_OPTIONS=--jitless pnpm install --frozen-lockfile/typecheck/lint/build -> passed.
Post-merge deployment: systemctl --user restart leitstand.service -> active running.
Post-merge canonical smoke: curl -k https://leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa/health -> status ok, git head 52825f4af4693b652f4cffc06297463a93a7ee0e, bureau snapshot ok, checkout snapshot ok.

verified_acceptance.read-only-health: src/runtimeHealth.ts reads process metadata, .git/HEAD and local snapshot artifacts only; the receipt explicitly marks ingress as not_checked and includes non-claims for DNS, Caddyfile persistence, Bureau task truth and operator action authority.
verified_acceptance.freshness-boundary: The receipt reports missing/wrong/corrupt snapshots as fail, stale snapshots as warn and fresh contract-shaped snapshots as ok without claiming Bureau or Grabowski truth.
verified_acceptance.canonical-health-smoke: Canonical HTTPS /health returned kind=leitstand_runtime_health_receipt and status=ok after main deployment.
